name: case-sensitivity
description: Path case sensitivity - paths are validated case-sensitively, collision detection happens at manifest level

tests.name: uppercase_path_valid
tests.description: Uppercase path is valid (case is preserved)

tests.name: mixed_case_directory_valid
tests.description: Mixed case directory path is valid

notes: Individual paths are validated without case folding. Windows-canonical collision detection happens at manifest level per spec Section 4.2.2. See manifest/duplicate-artifact-paths.json for collision tests.
